title: Honeymoon
desc: Gitin is unable to go on a honeymoon with his wife, Jayanti, due to his workaholic employer. The couple seize their chance when Gitin's boss leaves for a trip, only to run into him in Mumbai.

title: Devi
desc: After returning from overseas, Arun marries Jaba, an orphan who contributes to the temple. But Arun's vindictive relatives try to drive the couple apart.

title: Classroom
desc: Teenagers enjoy their school life to the fullest, until a boy gets murdered in a classroom, and everyone in the institution comes under the radar of suspicion.

title: Loveria
desc: Aditya, a car mechanic, falls in love with Sweety, a wealthy and spoiled young woman. Although they wish to marry, Sweety's father strongly opposes their union.

title: Maayakumari
desc: A moviemaker sets out to a make biographical movie on Mayakumari, the legendary actress, and tries to find out the reasons that caused her disappearance.

title: Hero
desc: Shubhankar falls for Puja and manages to win her love after relentless pursuits. However, things take a complicated turn when Puja's brother decides to kill Shubhankar.

title: Mister Bhaduri
desc: Aniruddha, the boss of a company, goes to a bungalow every weekend with a bunch of roses and pretends to stay with someone he loves.

title: Jongole Mitin Mashi
desc: A detective is assigned the responsibility of investigating a gang of poachers suspected of illegally hunting wild elephants in the forest.

title: Rosogolla
desc: A sweet maker goes through a series of trials and tribulations as he embarks on a mission to create a unique dessert for his wife.

title: Action
desc: Raka, the daughter of an influential politician, always gets what she desires. However, all hell breaks loose when she is rejected by Akash, a fellow college student.

title: Suryavaanshi...The Family
desc: An orphan gets involved in a feud between two royal families while trying to impress his ladylove. However, he soon realises that the lives of his fellow villagers depend on his choices.

title: Kumari Maa
desc: After a tragic incident, Tridev comes to the conclusion that he might have accidentally murdered his family. However, chaos ensues after the police get involved.

title: Mr. Majnu
desc: A charming man who has never been in a serious relationship with anyone finds himself in unfamiliar territory when he finally falls in love with a woman.

title: Sindur Khela
desc: When Shubho and Shibani fall for each other, a misunderstanding strains Shubho's friendship with his best friend, Rajeeb.

title: Kakababur Protyaborton
desc: Kakababu goes on a trip to Kenya with Santu, his nephew. Things go sideways when they get caught up in a dangerous situation.

title: Kelor Kirti
desc: The lives of three young couples become complicated when a dazzling woman comes between them. Soon, chaos ensues as simple misunderstandings lead to huge problems.

title: Villain
desc: Arnab, an honest road inspector, is framed for corruption by authorities and sent to jail. Things take a turn when his wife is murdered, so he sets out to exact revenge.

title: Chaamp
desc: Shibaji, a famous Indian boxer, loses fame overnight when he meets with a tragic accident. After losing his title, he fights all odds to revive his career and become a champion again.

title: Dada
desc: Krishna, a sincere young man, is the lone survivor after his family is murdered by Shibnath. Many years later, when he has almost moved on from the incident, his life takes a turn.

title: Bagha Jatin
desc: Jatindranath Mukherjee plays a central role in the revolutionary struggle against colonial rule. He is revered for his leadership and dedication in India's quest for freedom.

title: Banglar Bodhu
desc: When her husband strays onto the wrong path, Mala decides to help him. However, Gokul, her brother-in-law, has his eyes set on their property.

title: Rong Beronger Korhi
desc: An anthology of four short stories portraying the impact of money on relationships characterised by different nuances of emotions.

title: Daal Bati Churma Chacchori
desc: After breaking up with his non-Bengali girlfriend, Anand's life takes a turn when Barsha, a Bengali girl, enters the picture, sparking a new romance.

title: Sentimentaal
desc: After being shifted to Raghunathpur, Suryaa Roy, a police officer, has to deal with Rudrani Chowdhury, a politician, who runs illicit trades.

title: Generation Aami
desc: A 17-year-old boy experiences teenage angst and exhibits rebellious behaviour. He then meets a 19-year-old girl, who helps him be brave and leads him on a journey of self-discovery.

title: Phool Aar Pathor
desc: Nandu wants to take over Mastermoshai's property. Meanwhile, his daughter commits suicide after being raped by an evil thug but Mastermoshai's son, Swadhin, and his friend Azad expose the culprit.

title: Ami Sudhu Tor Holam
desc: A young man falls in love with the granddaughter of a retired colonel. When he decides to confess his love, he feels heartbroken upon discovering her relationship with another man.
